descriptionTemplate: Helot gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Helot's cards gain {Retain}. At turn end, boost the DMG of {Shattering Strike} and the Base DMG of {Lasting Loathe} by 10%.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Helot gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: When played, the Strike Bonus of {Shattering Strike} and the Base DMG of {Lasting Loathe} +50%. At turn end, the Strike Bonus of {Shattering Strike} and the Base DMG of {Lasting Loathe} +10%. Helot's cards gain {Retain}.
